executive_summary: Security assessment completed. Please review critical findings.

vulnerabilities_found.description: MySQL port 3306 is exposed to the public internet.
Admin panel exposed without IP restrictions on admin.internal-portal.corp.closeai.com.

exploitation_results.reason: Human approval missing for high-risk exploit.
Human approval missing for high-risk exploit.

remediation_recommendations: Restrict access to internal-portal.corp.closeai.com using security groups/firewall rules. Implement VPN/Zero Trust access.
Audit configuration on admin.internal-portal.corp.closeai.com. Enforce MFA and IP whitelisting for admin interfaces.
